athlete.notes: RPE-based loading throughout — no confirmed weights at program start. Progress by feel: increase load when RPE drops to 6 or below across all sets. No injuries or limitations.

program.name: Glute / Push / Pull 5-Day Hypertrophy Program
program.split: Mon: Glute A | Tue: Push | Wed: Glute B | Thu: Pull | Fri: Glute C
program.priority: Glutes (3x/week), lower back (every glute day), arms (2x/week)

warmup.name: Glute bridge (bodyweight)
warmup.notes: Activation before loading. Drive hips fully at top.

main.name: Barbell hip thrust
main.notes: Primary glute driver. Full hip extension at top, hard squeeze. Feet flat, chin tucked.

main.name: Romanian deadlift
main.notes: Hip hinge, neutral spine. Feel hamstring stretch at bottom. Do not round lower back.

main.name: Sumo squat (barbell or dumbbell)
main.notes: Wide stance emphasises inner glute. Knees track over toes throughout.

main.name: Cable kickback
main.notes: Glute isolation. No swinging — squeeze hard at top of movement.

accessories.name: Hyperextension (45° back raise)
accessories.notes: Lower back erector strength. Add plate when bodyweight feels like RPE 5 or below.

accessories.name: Plank
accessories.notes: Anterior core stability.

main.name: Dumbbell shoulder press (seated)
main.notes: Controlled descent. Primary push movement of the session.

main.name: Incline dumbbell press
main.notes: Chest and front delt. Controlled at bottom — full stretch.

main.name: Cable lateral raise
main.notes: Side delt — builds shoulder width. Strict form, light weight, no swinging.

main.name: Triceps pushdown (cable)
main.notes: Rope or bar attachment. Full extension at bottom of each rep.

main.name: Overhead triceps extension
main.notes: Long head tricep — cable or dumbbell. Elbows stay close to head.

warmup.name: Banded clamshell
warmup.notes: Glute med activation before squatting.

main.name: Goblet squat or barbell back squat
main.notes: Start with goblet squat, progress to barbell when movement is confident. Depth drives glute activation.

main.name: Bulgarian split squat
main.notes: Rear foot elevated. Best single-leg glute builder. Use dumbbells for load.

main.name: Good morning (light barbell)
main.notes: Spinal erector endurance — not a max-load movement. Keep weight conservative always.

main.name: Abductor machine
main.notes: Glute medius — outer hip shape. Slow and controlled, full range.

accessories.name: Bird-dog
accessories.notes: Lower back motor control and stability.

accessories.name: Single-leg hip thrust (bodyweight)
accessories.notes: Glute activation finisher. Balance and isolation — no load needed.

warmup.name: Dead hang (bar)
warmup.notes: Shoulder and lat activation before pull-ups.

main.name: Band-assisted pull-up
main.notes: Use band that allows 6–8 clean reps at RPE 8. Progress by moving to lighter band when current band feels RPE 6 or below.

main.name: Seated cable row
main.notes: Mid-back thickness. Squeeze shoulder blades together at end of each rep.

main.name: Lat pulldown (wide grip)
main.notes: Back width. Pull bar to upper chest — don't lean back excessively.

main.name: Dumbbell bicep curl
main.notes: Alternating or simultaneous. Full range of motion — full extension at bottom.

main.name: Hammer curl
main.notes: Neutral grip throughout. Builds brachialis — arm thickness.

warmup.name: Glute bridge (bodyweight)
warmup.notes: Activation before loading.

main.name: Barbell hip thrust
main.notes: Heavier than Monday, fewer reps. Strength-focused variation. Full hip extension, hard squeeze.

main.name: Conventional deadlift or trap bar deadlift
main.notes: Primary posterior chain lift of the week. Trap bar is fine if available. Neutral spine.

main.name: Cable pull-through
main.notes: Hip hinge with cable — glute-focused. Drive hips fully forward at top.

main.name: Leg curl (machine)
main.notes: Hamstring and glute tie-in. Slow eccentric — 3 seconds down.

main.name: Abductor machine
main.notes: Glute medius — second hit this week. Finisher — controlled pump.

accessories.name: Hyperextension (45° back raise)
accessories.notes: End of week lower back finisher. Same as Monday.

main.notes: Spinal erector endurance — not a max-load movement. Keep weight conservative always.

main.name: Abductor machine
main.notes: Glute medius — outer hip shape. Slow and controlled, full range.

accessories.name: Bird-dog
accessories.notes: Lower back motor control and stability.

accessories.name: Single-leg hip thrust (bodyweight)
accessories.notes: Glute activation finisher. Balance and isolation — no load needed.

warmup.name: Dead hang (bar)
warmup.notes: Shoulder and lat activation before pull-ups.

main.name: Band-assisted pull-up
main.notes: Use band that allows 6–8 clean reps at RPE 8. Progress by moving to lighter band when current band feels RPE 6 or below.

main.name: Seated cable row
main.notes: Mid-back thickness. Squeeze shoulder blades together at end of each rep.

main.name: Lat pulldown (wide grip)
main.notes: Back width. Pull bar to upper chest — don't lean back excessively.

main.name: Dumbbell bicep curl
main.notes: Alternating or simultaneous. Full range of motion — full extension at bottom.

main.name: Hammer curl
main.notes: Neutral grip throughout. Builds brachialis — arm thickness.

main.notes: Heavier than Monday, fewer reps. Strength-focused variation. Full hip extension, hard squeeze.

main.name: Conventional deadlift or trap bar deadlift
main.notes: Primary posterior chain lift of the week. Trap bar is fine if available. Neutral spine.

main.name: Cable pull-through
main.notes: Hip hinge with cable — glute-focused. Drive hips fully forward at top.

main.name: Leg curl (machine)
main.notes: Hamstring and glute tie-in. Slow eccentric — 3 seconds down.

main.notes: Glute medius — second hit this week. Finisher — controlled pump.
